title: Baker Ross EK632 Large Self Adhesive Acrylic Gems (Pack of 120) Multicoloured Embellishments for Kids Arts and Crafts, Assorted
features: Craft Supplies: These stick ons are the ideal way to brighten your day, and creative kids will love putting them on all their crafts in creative play.
Children's Stickers: These are so versatile as they can stick to paper, card, plastic or whatever else your decorating, the possibilities of decoration are endless!

Creative Ideas: Our self-adhesive stickers for kids are perfect for crafts and collage. Use for school supplies, art supplies, reward stickers for children, embellishments, card making, scrapbooking supplies, and more.
Included in the Pack: Our mini self-adhesive rhinestones for scrapbook embellishments measure 15 - 25 mm and come in assorted colours and shapes.

Made by Experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing the very best art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: Product Description These embellishments for crafts may be delicate, but they’re also seriously dazzling! Sometimes, crafting is all in the details, and these little jewel stickers are no exception. With a simple peel and stick you can transform a simple make into a twinkling creation worthy of royalty! Children will be wowed when they spot these glimmering craft jewels, and will be excited to jazz up everything from notebooks to signs on their room. Ideal for cards, gift-wrap and more, with craft gem stickers as versatile as these you’ll never get bored! Stick, create, design and decorate!  Baker Ross is a family owned and run business creating innovative arts, crafts and party favor products. Designed in the United Kingdom - Baker Ross: inspiring creativity. Safety Warning WARNING! Not suitable for children under 36 months - small parts. Choking hazard. Retain address.
